positive: Botanical scientific illustration of various fantastical flora. Detailed cross-section view of oversized leaves, exotic flowers, and root systems, presented as if drawn in an antique scientific journal. Pen and ink style, vibrant but muted colors, labeled diagram.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy background, watercolor wash, cartoonish
